channel.title: GNfinance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNfinance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Charter Communications Stock Posts Record Single-Day Decline
item.description: Charter reported higher-than-expected internet subscriber losses last quarter, raising continued questions about the company's competitive position in the broadband market.

item.title: French Weather Agency Files Police Complaint Over Suspected Polymarket Manipulation
item.description: Temperature readings at Charles de Gaulle International Airport spiked by several degrees within minutes, prompting a formal police complaint from French meteorological authorities.

item.title: Nvidia Stock Nears Record Close for First Time in Six Months
item.description: Nvidia is on track to re-enter $5 trillion market cap territory, rounding out a strong week for the broader semiconductor sector.

item.title: Parent in Their 40s with $330,000 Saved Seeks Plan to Cover Two Lifetimes
item.description: A parent with a child requiring lifelong care questions whether their retirement savings have grown enough to support both their own needs and their dependent's.

item.title: Analysts Say Crude Oil Prices Unlikely to Return to Pre-Iran War Levels Soon
item.description: SLB and Halliburton indicated this week that elevated crude prices are expected to persist, with broad implications for energy-related industries and consumers.
